reviews.comment:
Durante el día los playeros son muy amables y activos, por las noches son un desastre. Pase con mi señora una noche de domingo casi una hora esperando, nadie me dio una solución hasta que le dije al de seguridad que iba yo mismo a cargar combustible. No te dan el libro de queja y no hay responsables.

(Translated by Google)
During the day the gas station attendants are very friendly and helpful, but at night they're a disaster. My wife and I spent almost an hour waiting one Sunday night, and no one offered a solution until I told the security guard I'd pump the gas myself. They don't give you a complaint book, and there's no one in charge.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2511053987051317301/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNBdTd2VnZRRRAB
